questions.question: Describe the primary function of the graphical user interface (GUI) in the context of an operating system. How does it facilitate user interaction with the system?
questions.hint: GUI components, mouse, keyboard, visual representations

questions.question: Compare and contrast the command-line interface (CLI) and graphical user interface (GUI) in terms of user interaction and operating system functionality.
questions.hint: Entry points, user input, operating system commands

questions.question: What is the role of the desktop and taskbar in the graphical user interface of an operating system? How do they contribute to user productivity?
